critic_notes: Five of six questions are solid. Question 3-004 has a minor quote mismatch: the quote contains 'Vertraulich- keit' (hard hyphen + space), while the source uses a soft hyphen + line break which normalizes to 'Vertraulichkeit'. This is a cosmetic rendering artifact and the intended passage is unambiguous. Questions 3-003 and 3-005 are labeled 'experte'; 3-003 is borderline (the answer is a single explicit sentence in the source) but 3-005 genuinely requires interpretive reasoning, so both are acceptable. All other quotes, correct answers, and distractors are accurate. Schema correct (nulls).

issues.detail: Quote fragment contains 'Vertraulich- keit' (hard hyphen + space) but normalized source reads 'Vertraulichkeit' (soft hyphen + newline joined). The intended passage is unambiguous but the quote string does not produce a verbatim substring match after normalization.
